subject: Anime figure in a white and black futuristic outfit, arms outstretched in a dynamic performance pose, with a glowing blue-green energy field behind them
description: A framed Weiss Schwarz card depicting an anime figure in a white and black sleeveless outfit with mechanical-futuristic styling, including dark shorts and white arm coverings. The figure stands with both arms spread wide in an energetic performance or summoning pose, facing forward. Short hair frames the face. Behind the figure, a dramatic blue-green energy burst radiates outward against a dark background, creating a strong backlit halo effect. The overall mood is high-energy and theatrical.
foreground: anime figure in white and black outfit, arms outstretched
background: radiating blue-green energy burst against dark background
emotion: arms spread wide, open and triumphant posture, exuberant performance energy
